primary_task: Compare relevant project experience and find a contact path
content_sequence: Project rows with year, role, scope, and artifact
responsive_reflow: Stack year, role, and scope below the name
Place the artifact after its text alternative and caption
growth_test: Fifty projects remain one filterable index using the same record schema.

rejected_patterns.reason: Time is secondary to comparing project relevance.
The artifact is not selling one standardized service.

unknowns: Whether project confidentiality requires anonymized names
